author: anon-59ff128d
content: Extracted shared file-processing logic into three new functions in shared.rs: apply_to_file() (read + engine apply), commit_file_changes() (backup + undo + atomic write), print_changes() and print_final_summary() (output formatting). Both file_mode.rs and script_mode.rs now call these shared functions instead of duplicating the logic. file_mode retains its --confirm interactive flow; script_mode retains its per-op glob and backup deduplication via HashSet. All 209 tests pass.
